potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall inform relevant authorities in the event of an accident.
The system shall send notifications during driving or in case of an accident.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: From there, the user can turn on driving mode or continue with other options.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to activate driving mode or choose other options after viewing journey details.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If an accident happens, the system informs the concerned authority and sends a notification.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall inform relevant authorities in the event of an accident.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall send notifications during driving or in case of an accident.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions that the system sends notifications when needed, but it does not specify 'during driving'.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall display journey details upon user login and destination selection.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is already covered by the first rewritten requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable users to select a place to eat, view its menu, and place an order if they are hungry.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is not explicitly mentioned in the source text. The source text only mentions that users can choose a place to eat.
